reviews.review_description:
I have this game, and I can tell you exactly why I made a good purchase! This game is possibly the best and most creative VR game I have! When you consider the company that made this (owlchemy) it's the same one that made job simulator, but that being said, they could have just made this game another follow up, and called it school simulator, but oh no, they did a lot more than that! They instead decided to make a school in space, with many types of space creatures, and decided to put you in the shoes of the only prismi there, only for a prismi to have a bunch of superpowers that make it fun to control and solve puzzles.

Great business move? I think so! But something great that you can do with your money, would be to buy this game

So sincerely, thank you owlchemy

developer_response.body: Hey new kid! We're so happy to hear you enjoyed your time in Cosmonious High.

reviews.review_description:
This game is possibly the best and most creative VR game so far
The superpowers make it fun to control and solve puzzles. The best part of this game is its long and has not only the main story but side quests that make you want to 100 % the game. And collect the cutest creatures along the way I would think a sequel would be vary successfully perhaps the prismi goes to college where new powers and more blebs are found 

 Anyway This game is a great buy along with the other titles. can’t wait to see what owlchemy thinks up next it surely will be as creative and fun as this.

reviews.review_title: Best game I've ever played but...
reviews.review_description: I love playing this game but,my controllers are both dead.I wish this game could have a no controllers thing.Also,I think this game should have a sequel,something like "Comsonious Collage"BEST GAME ON VR EVER!

ive beaten this game like 3 times now. im lowkey hyperfixated on it. i need new content owlchemy i would pay a million prax bux for it.

my only complaint is that the story is kinda boring and has a lot more potential, ESPECIALLY the climax and falling action. I can't really talk about it without spoiling the game but it's just anticlimactic and disappointing in my opinion. the rest of the game is really good though!

also tell the intercom I love them

reviews.review_description: i bought the game with my own money and bought it and I'm stuck at the start I've tried everything fix it scammers
if you like space and school this is the game for you

I like this game, but i cant reach some tall things like the leaky pipes you have to fix. Again, its a great game with a good concept, but, I know some things that could be better. For instance, there should be maybe an update with some new stories and even some new blebs. Overall though, it is a good game, it's just hard to get all the achievements. Four stars.

I am obsessed with this game and I love how the little color balls can eat and k1ss you I do want one more thing added or something like it. In the music room I think it would be cool if you could add a guitar to the game and a piano with lots of lessons .

this game was really bad i played a whole lot of it trying to see if it gets good never did the powers suck. wasting my time why would everyone play a game like this can i please get a refund she's so bad i bought it with $20 i thought it was gonna be real good game cuz i saw the reviews but it sucks do not buy please refund please have a good day goodbye

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear that you didn't enjoy your time in Cosmonious High.  We don't directly handle store purchases and refunds. To request a refund,  contact the Meta Quest store team for assistance.

I’m here to balance the ratings from the guy who simply didn’t use “small student mode,” or didn’t know that every power is ranged

reviews.review_title: V fun sandbox or gentle adventure game
reviews.review_description:
My son has v limited understanding so can't play games with complex controls or plots. He just likes to interact with a environment and mess everything up. 

This game is perfect for that. Big, fun areas, loads of items and cool powers to play with (he esp loves flinging things away with the telekinises power or changing the size of everything with the size power), little creatures to interact with. 

I've really enjoyed it too as a parent. Getting all 100 achievements and then all the extras like the cards and trying to find new Blebs. 

I didnt think Vacation Simulator (his second favourite game) could be improved upon but this is somehow even better.
If you like weird and wacky Games with great replayability and a Post Game, THIS IS FOR YOU!

reviews.review_title: This is my favorite game of all time
reviews.review_description: This was the first game i bought with money when i got my vr.its awesome and i find it interesting and if they were to make new game it should be the prismi (us) in college with a dorm and everything

developer_response.body: We're so glad you enjoyed your Cosmonious High life! May the spirit of the blebs be with you always.

reviews.review_description: I saw this game and it looked fun so I tried it and my gosh it was the only game I played for 3 day in a row it just has so Mitch in it all the charters are fun all the credits and take are fun basically every thing in this game is fun and iv replayed it so many time I highly recommend

reviews.review_title: Good game, give it a go.
reviews.review_description:
I’m older so perhaps this game wasn’t made for me but even so I enjoyed it. It is like a Cartoon Network cartoon. Some stuff for the adults but mostly geared towards young people. I completed the game. My OCD made me 100 percent it as well. (no rewards for doing that, bummer)

This is a top tier VR game that makes very good use of the platform. It is technical good as well. 

That said I liked Vacation Simulator (same dev) a little better.
I really enjoy the game but I wish there was more stuff to do like more quests, areas, and more powers but overall the game is one of my favorite games on VR.

developer_response.body: We're so glad you enjoyed your time in Cosmonious High new kid. As for things to do, have you collected all the cards and blebs yet? That's a fun extra hunt for the avid completionist!

reviews.review_description: Ok first things first this game is made by the same team as Job Simulator and Vacation Simulator ( the latter game's DNA is all over this) so if you enjoyed that and want another game to scratch that itch so to speak this game will do it this game is so bloody charming and witty ( despite the trailer giving off cringey how do you do fellow kids vibes)  so yeah the game is worth the £9.99 price point ( approximately $13.09 for you Americans)
Wish it had more content as I beat it very quickly and I wish it had more classes

(Unfortunately I couldn't find my way on their page. Contact through e-mail would've been easier for someone as myself who isn't very handy with the internet.)

This is an incredibly fun game. I loved it and wish it would've taken longer to complete.

==
Prax conversation isn't functioning. Instead of offering a conversation to resolve the argument, it offers the same general conversation options on a loop. I've been trying for a week now.

I sent an e-mail to owlchemysupport 5 days ago. No response sofar.

developer_response.body: Our team is happy to help in our official Discord (discord.gg/owlchemylabs) Drop into our help channel and we'll help look into this for you.

reviews.review_description: Ive love Owlchemy labs ever sense i watch dantdm play job simulator so as you would think i would know of this game’s existence before 2 months ago well no i found this game when i got a free trial on meta quest+, as i was looking through the games i saw cosmonious high, i thought hmm that look pretty cool lets try it so i did when i got in for the first time i saw the iconic owlchemy labs cartridge ￼selection section and immediately knew this was by them skip a little i beat the game and for some reason i couldn’t hold myself together and i cried. The end song is so amazing at that moment i thought wow how could i have never know about this game when its been out for years i wanted to play more so i thought why not 100% the game so thats what i did skip a little again im back where i was before but this time with nothing left to do so i sat there and cried again this game was so good would 100% recommend to anyone who is looking for a story vr game by far the best vr game to date i could go on about this game for hours but i dont want to type for hours so im gonna end it here by saying i doubt the devs will see this but if you do please make a sequel game i would seriously pay over 100$ for that one game. Thank you guys for make such a beautiful game .
I really enjoyed this game. It has great graphics and physics and an engaging plot line. Would recommend!

reviews.review_title: Just looJust looking at it looks amazing
reviews.review_description: I have this game and I played on a different console, but oh my gosh, this games amazing ￼

I enjoy the play and hunt. It could be more difficult hit then it wouldn't be as relaxing. One little glitch with the photo holder but otherwise works like real, well as real as the situation can. I get lost in the cleanup and quest.

Loved job an vacation simulator,and while I didn't get to play too much of this one yet,it's already got all the charm I know and love from these games. There's only 2 things I'd say I'd change,or at least add in the settings menu. I'd love for there to be smooth movement and turning. Even as a toggle setting,it's make the game insanely easier for me to play

You should add a portal hand where you can create a decently sized portal and then put another one in a certain vicinity. That’s at least a decent amount away from the other portal at least and put stuff through it. You could even be able to look through one portal to see out the other, but you can’t go through it. This is just a suggestion, but if you do add this, I promise people will love this add on in the game and you should also make like a level where a portal is necessary and then. For the prismi to unlock it.

I remember first starting the game and when I loaded in it just was a blast how the game works so well how cute and vibrant with the emotions in the game 5 out of 5 and I lost my original save file but retrying the game I understand so much more my 7 year old brain didn't understand 🤣

This was my sons favorite game, however it appear a metaquest update has broke the game and now you cant start a new game or load an old game. I have reached out to the devs however they have no responded at all for the past month. Ive tried everything i can think of on my end.

Edit there is a way to restore your saves. fixed the issue thanks for reaching out

developer_response.body: We would love to know more about what's happening so we can best help. Can you drop us a line in our official community Discord? (discord.gg/owlchemylabs) You may also want to try restoring your save here: https://secure.oculus.com/my/cloud-backup/

It was so so so worth it and I would recommend this game for anybody new to VR it’s peak entertainment and although there is so much to do, I wish there were way more games like this.
